title: coelogyne crocea
intro: Coelogyne crocea is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia, characterized by its bright yellow and red flowers with a distinctive orange lip. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne crocea include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a treatment for snake bites. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
